hero.title_part1: We scale your service business so
hero.subtitle: Stop chasing clients. We build the marketing engine, the website and the internal systems so qualified leads find you and your team closes them faster.

home.services_heading: What we do for our clients
home.services_sub: End-to-end services designed to drive qualified leads, convert them faster, and keep your operations lean.
home.how_we_work_sub: A straightforward process designed to deliver results quickly without the usual agency runaround.

process.title: Discovery call
process.desc: We learn about your business, current marketing and goals. No sales pitch—just honest conversation.

process.title: Audit & strategy
process.desc: We audit your ads, website and tracking, then build a 90-day roadmap with clear priorities.

process.title: Build & launch
process.desc: We execute on the plan—campaigns, pages, tools—while keeping you in the loop at every step.

process.title: Optimize & grow
process.desc: We track results weekly, refine what works, cut what doesn't, and scale what converts.

home.cta_sub: Whether you need to fix tracking, clean up your Google Ads, redesign your website or build an internal tool, we can help you prioritize what will move the needle first.
home.cta_li1: Honest audit of your current marketing and tracking
home.cta_li2: Clear roadmap for the next 90 days
home.cta_li3: No long-term contracts, just work that performs

why_hive.sub: We don't just run ads—we build the entire system that turns clicks into closed deals, so you can focus on running your business while leads come in consistently.

items.title: We understand service businesses
items.description: We work with HVAC, construction and home services providers. We know your sales cycles, seasonality and what a real qualified lead looks like.

items.title: Full technical stack in-house
items.description: Strategy, tracking, web development and internal tools under one roof. No finger-pointing between agencies and developers.

items.title: Obsessed with clarity and reporting
items.description: You get dashboards and reports that show where your money goes, what works, and what we are doing next—not vanity metrics.

footer.tagline: Digital growth agency helping service businesses generate and close more leads through performance marketing and modern technology.

about.intro: We combine performance marketing, modern web development and internal tools to build predictable growth systems for service businesses.
about.why_p1: We started Hive Media after seeing the same problem over and over: 9 out of 10 service businesses—HVAC, roofing, construction—were burning money on ads that generated clicks but not real customers. Agencies would report on impressions and CTR, but nobody was asking "how many of those clicks turned into booked jobs?"
about.why_p2: We built Hive to answer that question and fix the entire pipeline from the ad click to the closed deal.
about.philosophy_highlight: strategy first, then execution, then iteration.
about.philosophy_rest: We don't believe in vanity metrics, long-term lock-in contracts, or doing work that doesn't directly move your business forward.

values.title: Technical and marketing in one place
values.desc: We bridge the gap between the marketing strategy and the code that needs to be written to make it real.

values.title: Transparent communication
values.desc: We share what we are doing, why we are doing it, and how it is performing—good or bad.

values.title: Long-term partnerships
values.desc: Our best work happens with clients that see us as partners and collaborators, not just another vendor.

steps: We start with a discovery call and a simple audit.
We design a 60–90 day plan focused on quick wins and critical fixes.
We implement, measure, and iterate with clear communication every step of the way.
about.cta_heading: Want to see if we're a good fit?
about.cta_sub: Let's have a conversation. No commitment, no pressure—just an honest look at where your business stands and what could move the needle.

contact.sub: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 1–2 business days with next steps or a proposal for a strategy call.

trust: No obligation — no spam, no strings attached
